data.title: RED test: Create behavioral tests for planning-intelligence log extensions
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Create `tests/skills/test-planning-intelligence-log-extensions.sh` with 3 behavioral tests verifying brainstorm SKILL.md planning-intelligence log contains the three new mechanism fields.

**Test rationale**: SKILL.md is a non-executable instruction document; source-grepping is the established testing pattern (see tests/skills/test-brainstorm-approval-gate.sh).

**Tests**:
- test_log_follow_on_scrutiny_field: Verify log contains follow-on scrutiny field (ran + depth via follow_on_scrutiny_depth)
- test_log_feasibility_resolution_field: Verify log contains feasibility-resolution field (cycle count + triggering gap via feasibility_cycle_count)
- test_log_llm_instruction_signal_field: Verify log contains LLM-instruction signal field (fired + matched keyword via matched_keyword)

**TDD**: All 3 tests FAIL against current log format (lines 416-423 have only web research, scenario analysis, and practitioner cycles — no mechanism fields).

### Files to modify
- tests/skills/test-planning-intelligence-log-extensions.sh (CREATE)
- .test-index (EDIT — add mapping with RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0) — RED marker tolerates expected failures
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -f tests/skills/test-planning-intelligence-log-extensions.sh && test -x tests/skills/test-planning-intelligence-log-extensions.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 3 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "^test_" tests/skills/test-planning-intelligence-log-extensions.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
- [ ] All 3 tests fail (RED state)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-planning-intelligence-log-extensions.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL"
- [ ] .test-index entry with RED marker
  Verify: grep -q 'test-planning-intelligence-log-extensions' .test-index
